productDisplayName: Palm Tree Kids Boys Solid White Jackets
description: Composition White sleeveless, hooded jacket made of 100% cotton, has hood with drawstrings, white ribbing around the armholes, insert pockets on the sides, zippered front placket, embroidered logo on the upper left chest and brand tab on the left hem Fitting Regular   Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detatchable accessories Get your little one ready for action with this white hooded jacket from palm tree. The simple design is accented with the green brand logo embroidered on the upper left chest. Team this with jeans, tees and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on the skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
